details.text: Recurrent Back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophies, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bones, joints, limbs or spine?

examples.corrected: You Vinesh A Nadar, declare that, you have fully understood the questions asked to you as per this call and have furnished complete, true and accurate information after fully understanding the same. Sir/Mam, are you in agreement with the declaration that I have read out to you.
Cancer or carcinoma-in-situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukaemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumours, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or other growths

Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, Pancreatitis/Pancreatic disorder or any gastrointestinal diseases or disorders
Deafness, Impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficulty in swallowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ears, nose or throat
